commits: b573e22 - bober(sprint-3): event-stream MCP tool with server-initiated notifications and backpressure
014cc06 - bober(sprint-3): fix smoke test timing — pre-create history.jsonl and extend notification wait

criteriaResults.evidence: src/mcp/event-stream.ts: EventStreamManager.subscribe → {subscriptionId,status,startedAt}; unsubscribe → {ok}. 8 unit tests in event-stream.test.ts pass.

fs.watch on history.jsonl + telemetry/<date>.jsonl. Notification via server.notification({method:'bober/events',params:{subscriptionId,event}}) — Protocol base class. Integration smoke test (InMemoryTransport linked pair) verifies notification arrives within 2s.

Per-subscription bounded queue (default 1000 via pipeline.eventQueueBound). deliver() drops OLDEST via queue.splice(0, overflow); flush deferred to microtask. Scenario 2: 2000 events → exactly 1000 delivered + 1 bober/events.dropped with dropped=1000.
subscribe-events.ts + unsubscribe-events.ts registered via index.ts; tools.test.ts asserts 22; external-server-graph.test.ts 22/28.
FileWatch refcounting + releaseWatch closes watcher at refCount=0. Scenario 6: 50 subscribe/unsubscribe cycles → fileWatches.size === 0.
extractRunId checks rec.runId and rec.details.runId; lines lacking both are skipped. Scenarios 3+4 verify.
typecheck 0, lint 0, build 0, test: 90 files, 1189 passed, 4 skipped.

filesChanged.description: EventStreamManager + initEventStream/getEventStream late-bound singleton; fs.watch with refcount; drop-oldest bounded queue; date-rollover poller

notes: Notification method 'bober/events' + overflow notification 'bober/events.dropped' via server.notification (Protocol base). Backpressure proof: microtask-deferred flush so synchronous deliver() batch completes before flush starts — without defer, scenario 2 would yield 1001/999, with defer it yields exactly 1000/1000. Type-only runId extraction (no writer changes); existing legacy events without runId are skipped. Singleton ordering: initEventStream AFTER server.connect; getEventStream lazy in handlers. Pre-creating history.jsonl in tests avoids parent-dir watch race window.
